content.en:
"Half an hour, the third round of assessment begins, please prepare!"

Mysterious voices reappeared.

Ye Tian didn't know what the third round of assessment was, it might be difficult, maybe it was just similar to the second round of assessment, but he had to face the third round of assessment in the best condition.

Airplanes!!!!

Suddenly, a scroll appeared in the void, and a pattern appeared on the scroll.

This pattern is engraved with rules, full of endless mysteries.

"Comprehend the virtual sky map composed of 10,086 rule lines, calculate the score according to the completion chart, please take the assessment immediately, the time is 10,000 years!"

A mysterious voice said.

"Ten thousand years?" Ye Tian frowned suddenly, and then asked: "Senior, the mist area will be closed in ten years, if I retreat and cultivate here for ten thousand years, will it have an impact?"

He just asked casually, and he didn't expect the owner of this mysterious voice to speak.

This mysterious voice may be a machine spirit, or a strong man of the Ox Clan, etc., but it may not necessarily answer him.

However, the other party really responded.

"Assessors, please rest assured, the misty area will be closed in ten years, and the creatures in the mist area will leave the main space of the universe and enter the special latitude where the Chaos God Realm is located, and that latitude is the place where the Supreme cannot get out, and it is not obliterated by the rules. In addition, the examiner is in the chaotic god realm, and it will not be affected, and the examiner can enjoy the enlightenment here without any problems. "

After receiving the answer, Ye Tian was completely relieved.

Immediately, his attention was focused on the pattern on the scroll.

The third round of assessment takes 10,000 years to assess, which shows that this assessment is very difficult.

"Void Heaven Diagram, I don't know how much I can comprehend, if I can comprehend it thoroughly, then I should be able to get a high score!" Ye Tian guessed.

He tried to speed up the experiment, but it didn't work.

If he wanted to comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram in an environment of accelerated time, he had to use the time rule to shroud the Void Heaven Diagram, but as soon as his time rule touched the Void Heaven Diagram, it immediately collapsed.

"Hey, there's no way to take shortcuts, so let's be honest!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he turned on his talent for comprehension and did his best to comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram.

It's a pity that the comprehension talent can increase the comprehension by 20 times when the cultivation is low, and he used to think that this increase can always be increased, but after growing to the cosmic god, he knew that this increase was full of reduction, and now at his level, the level of comprehension talent is too low, at most it can only be increased by two or three times.

In fact, the same is true for other talents, the stronger the strength, the lower the amplification effect.

If you enter chaos in the future, the amplification effect will be even lower or even close to nothing, because the effect of the talent born in the universe in chaos will be greatly reduced.

Enlightenment!

Ye Tian continued to comprehend the rules on the Void Heaven Diagram, but soon he frowned.

"Such a profound rule, the rules in the universe are too weak compared to the rules above, this is the supreme rule in chaos, difficult, too difficult to understand!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Originally, he thought that he was expected to complete the Void Heaven Diagram within 10,000 years, but now he knew that it was almost impossible.

......

Outside the Temple.

Niu Ryu and the other Niu Ren clan powerhouses were looking at the temple, and they judged by the time that Ye Tian had already conducted the third round of assessment, otherwise he would have come out a long time ago.

"Niu Ryu, this Terran kid's talent is indeed very good, if the strength and potential are not enough, there will be no third round of assessment at all. At the beginning, the kid called Yuntan Tianjun did not enter the third round, and only obtained the identity of an ordinary registered disciple, although his strength increased a little, but he only took a secret treasure from the temple, and he was lucky to get away. And this human kid is afraid that his future achievements will far surpass that of Yuntan Tianjun, but it is not clear how many star god generals he will be able to step into in the end?"

The third elder Niu Tong said.

"At the very least, it's also a six-star god general, as long as you become a registered disciple of that great existence and get some inheritance, at least you can become a three-star god general, and Yuntan Tianjun is a three-star god general, and this human race kid has higher potential than Yuntan Tianjun, and he has entered the third round, and he is expected to be a six-star god general." As for the higher level, it is too difficult! In the chaos, it is too rare for a god general above the seven stars to be a god, and there are countless disciples of the strong people of the Dao, but it is extremely rare to be able to step into the ranks of the seven-star god generals in the end, not to mention that we are just a inheritance hall here, there are countless registered disciples of that great existence, many formal disciples, and some personal disciples, but if you want to step into the seven-star god general, you are basically the best among the official disciples!" Niu Ryu said enviously.

His potential is limited, and he has no way to leave the Chaos God Realm, so he can only maintain this strength.

"Formal disciple, is there any hope for him?" Niu Tong had expectations, but felt hopeless.

It was too difficult and too difficult to become a full-fledged disciple of that great being!

"If he can become an official disciple, our clan can break away from this universe and return to chaos, and even be allowed to enter that place, and we can continue to improve our strength and step into the Heavenly Destiny Realm!" Niu Ryu thought excitedly.

But they could only think about it, and they didn't think that Ye Tian could become an official disciple.

----------

Time passed little by little, and in the blink of an eye, it was 3,000 years.

Ye Tian is still comprehending the Void Heaven Diagram, although the progress is slow, but now he has also comprehended 6% of the Void Heaven Diagram.

This progress is very slow, but Ye Tian has no choice but to continue to comprehend like this.

Terran, inside the Supreme Temple.

A group of Supremes were frowning, and they were discussing an issue.

"The Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws is missing!"

Kunwu Supreme said.

"What, I'm afraid that the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme is a first-class Supreme, even if the Lord of the Yuan Gu makes a move, he may not be able to help the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme, how could he be missing?"

"No, the Wanfa Supreme did not retreat, but went to the misty area, and he informed me before he went, saying that he would enter the core area of the misty area to test it. But now that the mist area is closed, the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme has not come out. You should be aware that once the Fog Zone is closed, no one has ever come out. "Kunwu Supreme is also very sad.

"Could it be that the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws has fallen?"

One by one, the Terran Supremes became terrified.

The Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws is the Divine Needle of the Terrans, and once it falls, the status of the Terrans will be affected!

"It doesn't have to fall, ask the family members of the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme, they should have the treasures or incarnations of the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme, and they can confirm the life and death of the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme!"

Mixed Yuan Supreme said.

"Okay, I'll ask!"

Kunwu Supreme immediately incarnated into the Heavenly Pavilion and went to inquire about Xiao Yue.

Soon.

Kungo Supreme got the news.

"The Wanfa Supreme has not fallen, but the incarnation of the Wanfa Supreme has lost its strength to support and dissipated, but the wife of the Wanfa Supreme, Yue Tianzun, revealed a piece of news, the Wanfa Supreme has a doppelganger hidden somewhere, and that doppelganger mentions the situation of the Wanfa Supreme, and the Wanfa Supreme accepts a inheritance, once it comes out, its strength will be greatly improved, and it can even sweep all the Supremes in the entire universe!"

Kunwu Supreme said excitedly.

"Really?"

The Terran Supremes were all excited.

Sweeping all the supreme beings in the universe, what is this concept?

Could it be above the first-class supreme?
